use_cases: SaaS pricing calculator with subscriber-based tiered pricing
Dynamic pricing visualization for subscription businesses
Interactive pricing selector for email marketing platforms
Real-time cost estimation based on user-defined metrics
ai_summary: A dynamic pricing slider component that calculates subscription costs based on subscriber count. Features predefined pricing breakpoints with linear interpolation for counts between tiers, displaying real-time price updates as users adjust the slider. Designed for SaaS platforms with tiered pricing models.
